intro.speaker: Sera
intro.text: Oh... hello. Do you need help, or just a quiet place to stand?

talk_a_1.speaker: Sera
talk_a_1.text: I was just finishing another note for the infirmary ledger.

talk_a_2.speaker: Sera
talk_a_2.text: It helps me remember who is resting, and who needs a little more care.

talk_b_1.speaker: Sera
talk_b_1.text: I keep more tea on hand than most people expect.

talk_b_2.speaker: Sera
talk_b_2.text: Warm food and warm drinks do matter. Especially when they are shared.

talk_c_1.speaker: Sera
talk_c_1.text: Some people wait too long to say they are hurting.

talk_c_2.speaker: Sera
talk_c_2.text: I do not mind noticing first. That is part of what I am here for.

gift_wip.speaker: Sera
gift_wip.text: I am not ready for gifts yet... but thank you for thinking of me.
